title: uralepis capensis
intro: Uralepis capensis, also known as African geranium, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, making it useful for treating a variety of health issues. The plant is known to provide health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory problems, and treating skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. Uralepis capensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
